sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a1 + 2*a2*x + 3*a3*x^2.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_divide: Combinational signed fixed-point divider producing p(x)/p'(x).
sub_modules.nr_newton_update: Combinational Newton update block with derivative-zero hold behavior.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block checking absolute residual against tolerance.
sub_modules.nr_saturate_signed: Reusable combinational signed saturation helper for wide intermediate results.
